creator: ank@parex.riga.lv
text:
if need route packet to networks 192.168.x.x-192.255.x.x
	packet send from hp vectra pc to hp routed :-( instead cisco router
	for example address 192.188.189.3, 192.188.189.4
	after send command: route -vn get 192.188.189.3
	I receive 
	destination (192.168.8.0) [network]
	netmask     (192.168.8.0) :-(((

Fix: 

run gated :-(
	I my situation gated don-t need :-((
	FreeBSD 1 work OK w/ routed and gated on this network 
	addr 194.8.9.123 mask 255.255.255.192
How-To-Repeat: 
	Problem IMHO in routed. He wrong updates kernel routing table.
	Possible he confuse my subnetted network?
	if shutdown routed and work over ICMP redirect no problem
